parsed_review.summary: CP00-705 is a descriptor-only RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P04 implementation/workflow/permission slice pack (40 units, RP23.P04.M03.S21-RP23.P04.M05.S16, risk B). The pack correctly does NOT claim production_ready or runtime_ready (both false; status pending_review) and is pending exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review before adjudication, which this receipt supplies. Direct read-only inspection confirms: (1) binding and requirements match the prompt baseline exactly, including deliverable distribution 18/11/3/4/2/1/1 and micro-title distribution 2/22/16, next_pack CP00-706 / RP23.P04.M05.S17; (2) the descriptor validator (validators.js) enforces descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no raw/financial/credential payloads, no bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime opening, no permission-decision detail, no audit event body, no real financial data, and authority_boundary with claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; (3) the comprehensive FINANCE_INTEGRATIONS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION is spread into every generated result and a full scan of the 1.5MB contract found no true value on any sensitive/runtime field and no secrets; (4) Claude packets are read_only=true and non-final (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false); (5) Hermes packets are deterministic control-plane evidence shapes with emits_runtime_receipt=false and are not embedded in product runtime; (6) the generated contract projects CP00-705 as latest with cp694-cp704 historical and validation.valid=true; (7) tests in model.test.js assert all of the above with deepEqual errors []. Review hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, well-formed JSON), no prior invalid review attempts, and no pre-existing raw-output/receipt to reject. Changed-file scope is consistent and unrelated dirty/untracked files are correctly segregated from the pack. Provenance: the reported 23/23 validation matrix and npm test pass come from command-evidence.json (Bash unavailable to the reviewer) but are corroborated by direct static inspection of the test assertions, validator logic, and the on-disk contract state. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
